heading: Librarian of Congress; rules and regulations
label: 136 Librarian of Congress; rules and regulations
text: The Librarian of Congress shall make rules and regulations for the government of the Library.
notes: Prior ProvisionsR.S. §§ 88, 89, 4950, which were repealed by acts , ; , , 1431.Feb. 28, 1933, ch. 131, § 147 Stat. 1349Mar. 3, 1933, ch. 202, § 147 Stat. 1428

Amendments2015— struck out provisions relating to appointment of Librarian of Congress.Pub. L. 114–861972— struck out provisions which required the Librarian of Congress to give a bond in the sum of $20,000.Pub. L. 92–310

Short Title of 2015 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 114–86, § 1129 Stat. 675Nov. 5, 2015“This Act [enacting and amending this section] may be cited as the ‘Librarian of Congress Succession Modernization Act of 2015’.”section 136–1 of this title
